channel.title: BlackRoad OS Blog
channel.description: Thoughts on sovereign AI, self-hosted infrastructure, and building the tools you actually own.

item.title: How I Built a WireGuard Mesh Across 7 Nodes for $6/month
item.author: amundsonalexa@gmail.com (Alexa Amundson)
item.description: 5 Pis behind NAT + 2 cloud nodes. Hub-and-spoke WireGuard with full SSH. TLS edge pattern. Total VPN cost: $6/month.

item.title: Zero to 629 Repos: Lessons from Building Too Fast
item.author: amundsonalexa@gmail.com (Alexa Amundson)
item.description: 629 repos in 4 months. Most are stubs. Breadth vs depth as a solo founder.

item.title: How I Built a Search Engine on Raspberry Pis
item.author: amundsonalexa@gmail.com (Alexa Amundson)
item.description: FTS5 + Workers AI + D1. Full-text search with AI answers. No Elasticsearch, no Algolia.

item.title: Running 200 AI Agents on $38/month Infrastructure
item.author: amundsonalexa@gmail.com (Alexa Amundson)
item.description: 200 agents in a single Worker. Debates, leaderboards, persistent memory.

item.title: The Amundson Constant: A New Number from Combinatorics
item.author: amundsonalexa@gmail.com (Alexa Amundson)
item.description: G(n) = n^(n+1)/(n+1)^n. 50+ identities. 10 million digits on Raspberry Pi.

item.title: Why I Quit Finance to Build an Operating System
item.author: amundsonalexa@gmail.com (Alexa Amundson)
item.description: Series 7 to sovereign AI. Risk management is system design.

item.title: How I Built a Sovereign AI OS for $38/month
item.author: amundsonalexa@gmail.com (Alexa Amundson)
item.description: 5 Pis, 2 droplets, 26 TOPS, 18 domains, 200 agents. The full cost breakdown.

item.title: What is BlackRoad OS and Why We Built It
item.author: amundsonalexa@gmail.com (Alexa Amundson)
item.description: The internet was supposed to be decentralized. It became five companies and a login page. We're building the other thing.
